name: CIRE 11
tagline: atelier of 11 monogram candles · hand-poured in the Marais
equipment: copper double-boiler wax melter (12 L, brass gauge)
walnut pouring table with brass edge
apothecary shelves — smoked-glass jars of perfume oil (40 flasks)
trimming station: gold scissors, sealing-wax, embossing press
audience: gift-giving couples on rue de Rivoli walks
Tokyo + Seoul tourists chasing quiet rituals
rituals: consultation → smell 11 mother-scents on linen strips → client chooses 3 → wax poured live → wick set → 20-min cooling → hot-wax seal with monogram
signature_scent: Marais 1889 — cedar, beeswax, bitter orange, smoked leather
unique: only candle atelier in Paris that pours your custom blend in front of you, seals it with a personalised wax monogram, and boxes it in ivory linen paper tied with burgundy silk
materials: hand-cast limestone counters · unlacquered brass fittings · waxed oak floorboards · smoked glass · ivory linen curtains · burgundy grosgrain ribbon
brandmark: monogram CIRE·11 hand-engraved · burgundy wax-seal stamp · typewriter-style serial on each jar
